depends_on.name: stimulus_response_scalar_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_response_scalar this tuning curve was derived from.

fields.name: independent_variable_label
fields.documentation: String label(s) for the independent variable(s) the tuning curve was computed across. v1 ships this as a 1-element list whose single entry is a comma-separated list of variable names when more than one variable was crossed (e.g., 'spatial_frequency,temporal_frequency'). V_delta keeps it as a string array; callers split the comma-separated form themselves if needed.

fields.name: independent_variable_value
fields.documentation: Matrix of independent-variable values, one row per stimulus condition. Shape is (N_stimuli x N_independent_variables). For a single-variable tuning curve each row is length 1; for the 2D case (e.g., spatial-by-temporal frequency) each row is length 2.

fields.name: stimid
fields.documentation: Integer stimulus identifiers (1-based) for each row of independent_variable_value. Length equals number of stimulus conditions.

fields.name: response_mean
fields.documentation: Per-stimulus mean of the scalar responses (length equals number of stimuli).

fields.name: response_stddev
fields.documentation: Per-stimulus standard deviation of the scalar responses.

fields.name: response_stderr
fields.documentation: Per-stimulus standard error of the mean (length equals number of stimuli).

fields.name: response_units
fields.documentation: Units of the scalar response values. v1 often ships an empty array; populated when the source recording's units are known.

fields.name: individual_responses_real
fields.documentation: Real component of each individual trial response. Shape (N_trials x N_stimuli). Paired with individual_responses_imaginary for complex-valued responses; for real-valued responses individual_responses_imaginary is zero or absent.

fields.name: individual_responses_imaginary
fields.documentation: Imaginary component of each individual trial response. Same shape as individual_responses_real.

fields.name: stimulus_presentation_number
fields.documentation: Per-trial, per-stimulus index of the original stimulus presentation. Shape (N_trials x N_stimuli). Lets callers map an individual_responses_real[t,s] back to the original stimulus_presentation document. Cells may be NaN where the corresponding trial slot held no presentation (v1 corpora use NaN as the missing-trial sentinel).

fields.name: control_stimid
fields.documentation: Stimulus identifiers for the control (blank/baseline) condition(s). Often empty when no control was recorded.

fields.name: control_response_mean
fields.documentation: Mean response on the control condition(s). Same length as response_mean (typically broadcasts a single control value across stimuli).

fields.name: control_response_stddev
fields.documentation: Standard deviation of the response on the control condition(s).

fields.name: control_response_stderr
fields.documentation: Standard error of the mean for the response on the control condition(s).

fields.name: control_individual_responses_real
fields.documentation: Real component of individual trial responses on the control condition(s). Same shape conventions as individual_responses_real.

fields.name: control_individual_responses_imaginary
fields.documentation: Imaginary component of individual trial responses on the control condition(s).
